backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single portfolio polish feature (hero font size, nav scroll, phone placeholder, portfolio grid height, footer year) to its affected frontend component files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary of the portfolio site's component structure and styling setup.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all portfolio page sections in order and includes a Sonner toast notification provider.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About Me section with a scroll-animated illustration, bio text, a styled blockquote, language badges, and a floating years-of-experience badge.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with info cards (email, phone '+91 XXXXX XXXXX', location), an availability badge, and a validated contact form with loading state and success feedback via toast.
frontend/src/components/Education.tsx: Alternating vertical timeline section displaying four academic milestones with scroll-triggered entrance animations and sky-blue styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links (Instagram, Behance, LinkedIn), smooth-scroll navigation links, and contact details including email and location.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated headline, subheading, decorative blobs, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the Work and About sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Hire Me' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Filterable portfolio grid displaying design work categorized as Logos, Posters, or Social Media, with scroll-triggered animations and hover overlays on each item.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying three offering cards (Logo Design, Poster Design, Social Media Management) with icons, descriptions, feature lists, and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx: React component rendering a 'Skills' section with a responsive grid of four design tool cards (Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, InDesign), each with a custom SVG icon, proficiency level, and scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system (sky, coral, ink, surface), and adds utility classes for colors, shadows, and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (sky, coral, ink, surface), custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Syne), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the portfolio website for Sulekha Sahoo, tracking schema version, implemented features (hero, nav, about, skills, education, etc.), architectural notes, and build progress.
